channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Yuanzi-Shichangpu herb pair ameliorates mitochondrial energetics and restores blood-brain barrier integrity in Alzheimer's disease through the HIF-1α/GSK3β–Nrf2/PGC-1α axis
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Qi Yao, Yaling Wu, Yuan Luo Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-08-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.121696 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-05-14

item.title: Probiotics combat sarcopenia by restoring gut integrity in Alzheimer’s disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Rizwan Qaisar, M. Shahid Iqbal, Firdos Ahmad, Asima Karim Journal: EXPLORE Veröffentlicht: 2026-07-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.explore.2026.103428 ISSN: 1550-8307 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-05-14

item.title: Carpoxylon macrospermum leaf extract and its phenolic compounds: a multi-targeted therapeutic remedy for Alzheimer’s disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Fadila M. Hamed, Mohamed S. Mady, Sabah H. Elgayed, Yara E. Mansour, Shahenda Mahgoub, Kuei-Hung Lai, Chia-Ying Lin, Heba E. Elsayed, Fatma A. Moharram Journal: BMC Complementary Medicine and Therapies Veröffentlicht: 2026-04-11 DOI: 10.1186/s12906-026-05365-8 ISSN: 2662-7671 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-05-14

item.title: Tianwang Buxin Pill improves cognitive function in APP/PS1 mice by reducing neuronal damage and regulating synaptic plasticity
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Fengmao Zou, Xiangyu Ren, Guilan Huo, Peng Liu, Changshan Sun Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-08-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.121683 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-05-14

item.title: Phytotherapy for ageing-related multimorbidity: Systems-level insights into Centella asiatica in diabetes and Alzheimer’s Disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Sandesh Kumar Pattanaik, Debajani Mohanty, Asit Ray, Sudipta Jena, Sovan Pattanaik, Diptirani Rath Journal: Phytomedicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.phymed.2026.158026 ISSN: 0944-7113 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-05-14
